status: published two-family diagnostic benchmark; not a parameter-free prediction

source.citation: K.S. Babu, B. Bajc, V. Susic, A Minimal Supersymmetric E6 Unified Theory, arXiv:1504.00904v2 (2015)

basis.nu_c: SM-singlet right-handed neutrino in the SO(10) 16 subset of the E6 27
basis.s: additional SM-sterile SO(10) singlet 1 subset of the E6 27

fit_assumptions.reason_f2_zero: The numerical-fit ansatz immediately before Eq. (87) sets f2=0.
fit_assumptions.reason_Y351_prime_diagonal: A family rotation is used to diagonalize one symmetric Yukawa matrix; Table 2 reports only its 11 and 22 entries.
fit_assumptions.heavy_block_approximation: Electroweak-scale mixings with nu_prime_c are neglected when extracting the heavy singlet eigenvalues.
